Operation 'orderuploadedfile' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is too minimal and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. The improved description clarifies: (1) what input is expected (FileOrderRequest schema), (2) what the operation returns (TranslationRequest object), (3) the side effect (file queued for processing), and (4) the workflow context (file must be previously uploaded). This helps AI agents understand the operation's role in the translation workflow.

data.current_description: Order translation for an uploaded file.
data.description_suggestion: Submits a translation order for a previously uploaded file. Accepts a FileOrderRequest containing target languages and translation specifications. Returns a TranslationRequest object with the order details, unique identifier, and status. The file will be queued for translation processing by available translators.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. The improved description clarifies: (1) what input is expected (FileOrderRequest schema), (2) what the operation returns (TranslationRequest object), (3) the side effect (file queued for processing), and (4) the workflow context (file must be previously uploaded). This helps AI agents understand the operation's role in the translation workflow.

message: Operation 'quoteuploadedfile' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. The current description lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and the non-transactional nature of the operation. The improved description clarifies: (1) the input schema (FileOrderRequest), (2) the response type (QuoteResponse) and what it contains, (3) that this is a preview operation that doesn't create an order, and (4) the use case (cost estimation). This helps AI agents distinguish between quoting and ordering operations and understand when to use each.

data.current_description: Get a quote for translating an uploaded file.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a translation quote for a previously uploaded file without submitting an order. Accepts a FileOrderRequest containing target languages and translation specifications. Returns a QuoteResponse with pricing, word count, and estimated delivery time. No translation order is created; this is a read-only operation for cost estimation.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and the non-transactional nature of the operation. The improved description clarifies: (1) the input schema (FileOrderRequest), (2) the response type (QuoteResponse) and what it contains, (3) that this is a preview operation that doesn't create an order, and (4) the use case (cost estimation). This helps AI agents distinguish between quoting and ordering operations and understand when to use each.

data.current_description: Retrieve a cost estimate before processing a translation request.

data.current_description: Confirm and order a previously quoted translation request.
data.description_suggestion: Confirm and process a previously quoted translation request by its ID. Converts the quote into an active translation order. Requires the quote ID as input. Returns the confirmed translation request object with order status, processing timeline, and updated metadata. Side effect: initiates translation processing and may trigger billing.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on required input (quote ID vs request ID), what the response contains, and important side effects (billing, processing initiation).
